data.name: SisterWordEscape
data.detailed_description:
【SisterWordEscape】

2D像素色色游戏！更精致的人物与全动态像素CG演出！更有各种符合大伙XP系统的怪物~

在一座偏远的教堂中，恶魔从封印中醒来。为了收集足够复活的能量，它释放了大量的怪物，将教堂中所有纯洁的修女尽数玷污堕落，让她们不断怀孕、产下各种邪恶的怪物。

其中有一对姐妹尤其特殊，如果能让她们身心都彻底堕落，恶魔复活就只是时间问题……

【薇奈】（姐姐）

天真无邪的姐姐，从小就在教堂中长大，对于色情相关的事情一窍不通。

最喜欢的事情就是黏在妹妹身边，吃饭，祈祷，度过平凡而又幸福的生活。

她的肉体蕴含丰富的魔法能量，是恶魔最喜欢的补品=v=

【薇欧】（妹妹）

和姐姐不同，妹妹在服装方面的选择更为大胆，喜欢时尚的东西，对于色色行为更是充满好奇心，经常从外面购买{不正经}的教学资料。

虽然充满好奇心和知识，但本人对于色色行为却毫无抵抗力，平时也会努力表现得正经。

她的灵魂复杂多变却又纯洁无瑕，是恶魔最喜欢的补品2号。

PS:因为是容易高潮的体质，她总是很自卑。

因为疏忽大意，被触手拖入巢穴的姐妹~

触手会不断索取，直到她们身心都被彻底榨干，沦为合适的苗床喔-v-

{玩法介绍}

1.主人公切换，玩家能随时切换主人公姐妹，她们和不同怪物接触也会触发不同的动态CG喔ovo

2.解谜，轻松简单的解谜，保证大家都能愉悦通关

3.剧情分支，根据姐妹色色次数的不同，在游戏中后期会自动进入姐姐/妹妹的专属分支路线。

4.色色CG动画，碰到怪物就会进入色色环节，所以必须要想办法避开（主动去碰）喔。

5.战败CG，游戏途中会有一些{陷阱}，如果不小心中招的话可是会触发战败CG呢。

比如姐妹两人都被触手侵犯，在体内深处种下{魔种}……

data.short_description: 2D像素冒险解谜类ACT！ 操作修女姐妹逃出这座充满了邪恶和怪物的魔窟吧，如果途中不小心被捉住的话可是会被它们好好调教一番呢。 量大管饱的动态CG，更有色色陷阱与战败CG。 简单的操作，流畅的体验，一口气享受色色盛宴吧OvO

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 970 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: SisterWordEscape
data.detailed_description:
【SisterWordEscape】

2D Pixel Color Game! More exquisite characters and fully dynamic pixel CG performances! There are also various monsters that are compatible with everyone's XP system~

In a remote church, the demon woke up from the seal. In order to collect enough resurrection energy, it released a large number of monsters, tarnishing and corrupting all the pure nuns in the church, causing them to constantly conceive and give birth to various evil monsters.

One of the sisters is especially special. If they can completely degenerate physically and mentally, it is only a matter of time before the devil comes back to life……

(older Sister)

My innocent sister grew up in church since childhood and knows nothing about pornography.

My favorite thing is to stick to my sister, eat, pray, and live an ordinary yet happy life.

Her body contains abundant magical energy and is the devil's favorite tonic

(Sister)

Unlike her older sister, she is bolder in her clothing choices, likes fashionable things, and is curious about color behavior. She often purchases inappropriate teaching materials from outside.

Although full of curiosity and knowledge, I have no resistance to sexual behavior and usually strive to appear serious.

Her soul is complex and ever-changing, yet pure and flawless, making her the devil's favorite supplement number 2.

PS: Because she has a constitution that is prone to orgasm, she always feels insecure.

The sisters who was dragged into the nest due to carelessness~

Tentacles will constantly demand until their bodies and minds are completely drained, becoming suitable seedbeds-

{Gameplay Introduction}

1. The protagonist switches. Players can switch the protagonist sisters at any time. Their contact with different monsters will trigger different dynamic CG Oovo

2. Puzzle solving, easy and simple puzzle solving, ensuring that everyone can pass the level happily

3. The plot branch will automatically enter the exclusive branch route of the sisters in the middle and later stages of the game according to the number of colors and colors of the sister.

4. Color CG animation, when encountering monsters, it will enter the color process, so it is necessary to find a way to avoid (actively touch) it.

5. Defeat CG, there will be some {traps} during the game, and if accidentally hit, it can trigger defeat CG.

For example, both sisters were invaded by their tentacles and planted {devil seeds} deep inside their bodies

data.short_description: 2D pixel adventure puzzle solving ACT! The operating nun sisters should escape from this den full of evil and monsters. If they are caught accidentally on the way, they will teach them well. A dynamic CG with a large amount of content, as well as color traps and defeat CG.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 970 or greater
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
